summary: Decompiled several stage-related functions across granime, Corneria, Home-Run Contest, Kongo Jungle, Dream Land, and Rainbow Cruise, with associated header/type updates. The PR body claims all 7 functions matched by overnight script, while the loaded bot report records one 100% new match and several high-percent unmatched improvements plus small data-section regressions.

key_files.role: Decompiled grAnime_801C83D0 and added baselib/aobj.h include for HSD_AObjGetFlags.
Decompiled grCorneria_801DDDA8, moved local Corneria data typedef/extern block earlier, and used Ground/JObj position data plus Corneria data offsets to fill a Vec3.
Updated grCorneria_801DDDA8 prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grCorneria_801DDDA8(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*).
Decompiled grHomeRun_8021EDD4 and added grHr_804D6AD8 storage used by the setup calculation.
Decompiled fn_801D7700 collision-related callback and grKongo_801D7F78 entity-position proximity query.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Summary lists fn_801D7700 and grKongo_801D7F78

key_files.role: Updated grKongo_801D7E78 prototype from unknown signature to Vec3* grKongo_801D7E78(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*).
Extended grKg_804D6980 static struct with unk9C, unkA0, and unkA4 fields used by Kongo decompiled code.
Decompiled grOldPupupu_80210A24 and added small animation-index tables used by switch cases.
Decompiled grRCruise_80200074 initialization loop for Rainbow Cruise platform subentries and added extern grRc_804D4790.
Added typed grRCruise_SubEntry and replaced grRCruise_GroundVars pad_3C with x3C[3].

what_changed: Replaced placeholder comments for seven stage functions listed in the PR body: grAnime_801C83D0, grRCruise_80200074, grOldPupupu_80210A24, fn_801D7700, grKongo_801D7F78, grHomeRun_8021EDD4, and grCorneria_801DDDA8.
Updated header prototypes for recovered signatures in grcorneria.h and grkongo.h.
Added or refined stage-local data declarations and struct fields needed by the recovered bodies, including grRCruise_SubEntry and extra fields on grKg_804D6980.
Used natural loops in grRCruise_80200074 over three Rainbow Cruise subentries and in grKongo_801D7F78 over HSD_GObj_Entities.

Used stage/ground variable union fields such as gp->gv.rcruise.x3C, gp->gv.corneria, and gp->gv.unk rather than only raw pointer math, though grCorneria_801DDDA8 still uses pad-offset casts into grCn_Data.

smart_moves.text: When grRCruise_80200074 needed repeated initialization for three similar entries, the PR expressed it as a for loop over gp->gv.rcruise.x3C[i] rather than three copied blocks.
The PR paired function body recovery with prototype updates, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for grCorneria_801DDDA8 and grKongo_801D7E78.
The Rainbow Cruise update converted a raw 0x30-byte pad region into a typed array of three subentries, making field roles and stride explicit.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage object initialization code, a small fixed array in GroundVars can often replace a raw pad region once the repeated per-joint fields are clear.
evidence_refs: diff: grRCruise_SubEntry added with x00/x02/x04/x08/x0C fields
diff: grRCruise_80200074 initializes x3C[i] in a loop

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled function proves a signature, update the owning header instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Stage animation state checks can use baselib animation helpers directly when the needed type/include is recovered.

naming_conventions.name: grRCruise_SubEntry
naming_conventions.context: Typed replacement for part of grRCruise_GroundVars previously represented as pad_3C[0x30].

naming_conventions.name: x3C
naming_conventions.context: Address-style field name retained for newly typed Rainbow Cruise subentry array where semantics remain partly unknown.

naming_conventions.name: unk9C/unkA0/unkA4
naming_conventions.context: Unknown semantic field names added to a Kongo static struct; grKongo code uses unkA4 in angle accumulation.

naming_conventions.name: fn_801D7700
naming_conventions.context: Address-style static function name retained despite PR body describing collision behavior, consistent with conservative naming when semantics are not fully proven.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Kongo Jungle barrel cannon description

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK used in recovered functions where stack shape apparently needed padding.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Loaded evidence does not include objdiff details for why each PAD_STACK was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced local typed struct overlays and extern data declarations to make stage data accesses compile and match.
evidence_refs: diff: grCn_Entry and grCn_Data in grcorneria.c
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Corneria still uses pad-offset casts into grCn_Data, suggesting incomplete data typing.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used casts and duplicated locals to influence code shape in numeric routines.
evidence_refs: diff: grHomeRun_8021EDD4 casts rounded tick calculation to int then stores in f32 num_ticks
diff: fn_801D7700 uses idx and idx2 from the same ratio before clamping
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: No reviewer explanation is loaded; treat as observed matching-shaped source, not a global recommendation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used natural loops for repeated entity/subentry handling.
evidence_refs: diff: grKongo_801D7F78 iterates HSD_GObj_Entities->x14 linked list
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This aligns with the loaded natural-loops standard.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 59.40% (+0.01%, +220 bytes), one new 100% match for groldpupupu grOldPupupu_80210A24, nine improvements in unmatched items, and two data-section regressions.
No loaded review comments or human review feedback were present in this PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching grCorneria_801DDDA8 or grCn_Data to see whether pad-offset casts were replaced with typed fields.
Search for later changes to grRCruise_SubEntry and grRCruise_GroundVars x3C field names.
Search for grKg_804D6980 unkA4 rename or struct refinement in Kongo stage files.
Check whether grHomeRun_8021EDD4 later became a full 100% match or had sbss/sdata2 cleanup after the bot-reported regressions.
Search PRs referencing PAD_STACK in grCorneria_801DDDA8 or grKongo_801D7F78 for cleanup or verifier evidence.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2341 state MERGED and changed_files list
raw_diff: full diff excerpt for ten changed files
notes: The diff strongly supports changed files and source-level edits.

The PR body claims all 7 functions were 100% matched by overnight script, but the loaded bot report only records grOldPupupu_80210A24 as a new 100.00% match and reports the other named functions as high-percent unmatched improvements from 98.98% to 99.89%. This intake does not resolve that discrepancy.
No review comments are loaded, so reviewer intent or requested changes cannot be inferred.
Several semantic descriptions come from the PR body; they are author-provided and not independently proven by review comments in this slice.
PAD_STACK usage is visible in the diff, but the loaded evidence lacks narrow objdiff justification for each instance.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace recovered GroundVars pads with typed fixed arrays when repeated stage initialization reveals stride and fields
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2341, Rainbow Cruise initialization recovered a loop over three subentries and paired it with a new grRCruise_SubEntry type, replacing pad_3C[0x30] with x3C[3]. This is a graph-safe candidate for the lesson that repeated stage-object setup can justify a narrow typed GroundVars substructure.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Function recovery should update owning headers when signatures are proven
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2341 updated grCorneria_801DDDA8 and grKongo_801D7E78 declarations from unknown prototypes to concrete signatures in their owning headers alongside decompiled bodies/calls.

source_update_candidates.title: Require explicit verifier notes for PAD_STACK kept in matched stage functions
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2341 contains PAD_STACK(4) in grCorneria_801DDDA8 and PAD_STACK(16) in grKongo_801D7F78, but the loaded slice does not show per-function objdiff justification. This supports curator review of whether standards should emphasize recording narrow evidence whenever PAD_STACK remains.
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards already say matching tactics need evidence; this PR is a concrete example that could be used to enrich guidance if curator wants examples.

source_update_candidates.title: Stage ground variable types live in src/melee/gr/types.h and are used by stage source files
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2341 added grRCruise_SubEntry to src/melee/gr/types.h and used it from src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c via gp->gv.rcruise.x3C[i].
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible path fact for where stage GroundVars layouts are refined; route to curator rather than accepting from a single PR intake.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate PR/report mismatch on claimed 100% matches
source_update_candidates.text: The PR body says all 7 functions are 100% matched, but the loaded bot report lists only grOldPupupu_80210A24 as a new 100.00% match and shows the other functions as 98.98%-99.89% improvements in unmatched items.
source_update_candidates.reason: Curator may want to link both records or avoid promoting the PR-body verification claim as final without additional evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's statement that all 7 functions are 100% matched as an accepted validation result because the loaded bot report conflicts with it.
Do not infer human reviewer approval details; no review comments or reviews are present in the loaded slice.

Do not promote Corneria grCn_Data pad-offset casts as preferred style; they are observed in this PR but conflict with the broader typed-fields-over-pointer-math direction unless later evidence explains them.
Do not infer semantic names for unk fields such as grKg_804D6980->unkA4 or grRCruise_SubEntry fields beyond what the diff directly shows.
